selection_rule: BINANCE_USD_M currently trading perpetual; CRYPTO_NATIVE; USDT suffix; CRYPTO_ALT_MID_ACTIVITY_PROVISIONAL; age_days>=1100; current relative_spread_bps<=3.5; no OFFICIAL_MEME_SUBTYPE; symbol does not start with a digit; exclude BTCDOMUSDT; sort current 24h notional proxy descending; take first 12
primary_and_sensitivities: Exactly the parent study: 30d beta, q97.5 BTC shock, 30m cooldown, next-open 15m target; seven one-at-a-time sensitivities beta7/90, q95/99, target5/30m, extra5m latency
development_gate: Exactly the parent gate: data PASS; >=300 event observations; mean available assets>=8; primary mean and daily-cluster CI low >0; both halves >0; beat BTC-sign and own-sign baselines; no shock direction significantly negative; primary mean>=12bp to release evaluation
known_exposure: BTC 5m path and parent mature-alt output are exposed. No 5m Kline or beta-gap output for these 12 fixed mid-activity symbols was viewed before this checkpoint.
holdout_rule: Fetch 2025 only after fixed development gate and >=12bp; fetch 2026H1 only after unchanged evaluation passes; no symbol/threshold/window/sign selection from results.
